Specifies files and directories to ignore in version control for the mbedos5 target.

# Purpose
The content lists directories and files that are part of a software project. The directories `mbed-os` and `mbed-events` likely contain the Mbed OS and event handling libraries, respectively. The `.build` directory is typically used for storing build artifacts. The `.mbed` file and `mbed_settings.py` script are used for Mbed configuration settings. The `js/pins.js` and `source/pins.cpp` files contain JavaScript and C++ source code related to pin configuration or functionality. The `source/jerry_targetjs.h` file is a header file, possibly related to the JerryScript engine, which is a lightweight JavaScript engine for embedded systems.
